title: Cape Verde Faces Argentina’s World Cup Juggernaut. Its Fans Aren’t Stressed.
summary_full: Cape Verde, a tiny African archipelago, was thrilled to qualify for the World Cup, let alone take on the defending champions. But its fans feel confident.
summary_public: Cape Verde, a tiny African archipelago, was thrilled to qualify for the World Cup, let alone take on the defending champions. But its fans feel confident.
